scope: DOMDocument, DOMElement, DOMAttr, DOMText, DOMComment, DOMCdataSection, DOMNode, DOMNodeList, DOMNamedNodeMap, and DOMXPath platform probes
DOMDocument::loadXML through the libxml-backed parser bridge
DOMDocument load/save roundtrip for selected XML declarations, namespace declarations, comments, CDATA, attributes, and namespaced element names
documentElement tagName, nodeName, nodeValue, and textContent
DOMText nodeName, nodeValue, textContent, and constructor
DOMComment nodeName, nodeValue, textContent, data, and constructor
DOMCdataSection nodeName, nodeValue, textContent, data, and constructor
DOMAttr name, value, nodeName, nodeValue, and constructor
DOMNodeList count, length, item, and foreach
DOMXPath::query and DOMXPath::evaluate over document namespaces
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime xml -- --nocapture
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_vm dom -- --nocapture
PHPT_REUSE_LAST=0 PHPT_DEV_REUSE_TARGET_PASS=0 nix develop -c just phpt-dev-module MODULE=dom
next_step: Promote broader DOM behavior only after namespace-aware node ownership and libxml error state are modeled.
